meaning: adj.[语](通过身体动作和手势表意的)身势语的 身势学的
examples: The initial example from the health center in Ethiopia was a problem caused by a kinesic sign being used which had different meanings cross-culturally.
This paper focuses on kinesic behavior and paralanguage since their influence on interpretation are believed to be more conspicuous, compared with other categories of nonverbal communication.
